title: Fashion Radar Community Signal Import
description: Strict local JSON handoff contract for sanitized community or external-tool signal rows accepted by fashion-radar import-signals.

url.description: Source URL or stable reference URL for the observed item.

title.description: Short observed text, headline, or normalized signal phrase.

summary.description: Short sanitized note for local review.

source_name.description: Display name for the external tool or local export.

platform.description: Short provenance label. This is not stored as platform coverage.

source_weight.description: Local score weight accepted by import-signals.

collected_at.description: Timestamp for when the external tool produced the row.
